title: Vconic Site and Content Strategy
summary: Michael Donovan provided a health update. Perry Evans detailed VConic's OpenAI reliance for content, discussed positioning compliance against BPO cost-saving focus, and outlined a strategy for agentic AI observability. Key decisions included prioritizing the BPO market, refining messaging, and creating explainer videos. Action items involve Perry securing a video partner and Michael focusing on visualization mapping.

decisions.description: Prioritize BPO market over secondary telecom opportunity.
Focus VConic's strategy on agentic AI observability.
Create explainer video content for storytelling.
Establish VConic Labs as a distinct space for open source activities.
Refine hero messaging to emphasize VConic as VCon creator/educator.

actionItems.task: Find and short-list video production partners in Denver.

expectedOutcome.description: Selected video team for explainer videos.

actionItems.task: Work on visualization mapping, including video/animation concepts and derivative logo for Labs.

expectedOutcome.description: Concepts for site animations and Labs logo.

actionItems.task: Shortlist video people and queue up a meeting for review.

expectedOutcome.description: List of video candidates for team review.

actionItems.task: Develop subhero and subtext for VConic Labs content.

expectedOutcome.description: Draft content for VConic Labs section.

actionItems.task: Provide strong example of leveraging vector scroll animations.
Resurrect a person to work on video side for integrated look and feel.

expectedOutcome.description: Video specialist for consistent video series.

actionItems.task: Connect back early next week to review progress.
Connect back early next week to review progress.

tensions: Pushback from BPO executives on VConic's compliance proposition vs. their focus on cost-saving agentic automation.
Challenge of establishing a 'why now' argument for compliance as it's not a time driver.
Current text-based content is too dry for storytelling.
Debate on whether the site's visual design is 'too dark'.
referencesToPast: Michael Donovan had to rebuild the previous, broken version of the site in six days.

contributions.description: Shared personal health update and recovery progress.
Explained VConic's heavy reliance on OpenAI for content generation.
Highlighted pushback from BPO executives on compliance vs. cost-saving automation.
Proposed focusing on unmet need to observe human-bot conversations in agentic AI.
Detailed strategy to accelerate VCon standard through Anthropic, IETF, J, and Joe Hildebrand.
Emphasized leveraging Mitch Lieberman's BPO background and Rick Emory's CRO connections.
Proposed approaching top 50 BPOs with one enterprise project then standardizing VConic.
Stressed that video must be part of storytelling due to dry text content.
Suggested integrating subtle background video and animation for VConic checkmark logo.
Offered to lead finding a video person in Denver to capture B-roll.
Suggested using vector scroll animations for clean, tasteful movement.
Proposed refining hero messaging to recognize VConic as VCon creator/educator.
Provided an elevator pitch for VConic as a platform for centralized customer interaction records.
Advised that telecom opportunity should be secondary to BPO focus.
Introduced VConic Labs as a distinct space for open source activities and partner programs.
